description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a dark, solid-colored fabric. The sofa features three seat cushions along each segment, forming a right-angle configuration ideal for corner placement in urban environments such as parks, plazas, or communal outdoor spaces. The backrests and armrests are of equal height, providing a uniform and boxy silhouette with clean, straight lines. The cushions appear thick and plush, suggesting comfort, while the upholstery has a matte, slightly textured finish. The armrests are broad and flat, seamlessly integrated into the overall form without decorative elements. The base of the sofa is not visibly elevated, indicating either hidden or recessed legs, contributing to its grounded and sturdy appearance.
description: A modern, L-shaped sectional sofa with thick, dark fabric upholstery, boxy armrests, and a uniform, minimalist design. The sofa features plush seat and back cushions arranged in a right-angle layout.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full L-shaped configuration, with all seat and back cushions visible and the armrests forming the outer edges.
description_view_1: Top-down view from the opposite corner, highlighting the symmetry of the armrests and the continuous backrest along both segments.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the depth of the seat cushions and the height of the backrest and armrest, with the sectional's length visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the other segment, showing the same cushion depth and armrest height, with the sectional's width visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six individual, attached seat cushions and six matching back cushions, all uniform in size and arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Boxy, straight armrests present at both ends of the sectional, equal in height to the backrest, with a flat profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base design, likely providing a low, grounded appearance without exposed supports.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, segmented into three sections per side, matching the seat cushions, with no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
